items.name: Cadence Virtuoso
items.desc: Industry-standard analog & custom IC design. Used for schematic, layout, and simulation.

items.name: ngspice
items.desc: Open-source SPICE simulator. Essential for validating CMOS designs before layout.

items.name: Magic VLSI
items.desc: Open-source layout tool for DRC and layout used in academic settings.

items.name: SkyWater SKY130 PDK
items.desc: Open-source 130nm PDK from Google. Enables real chip tape-out for free.

items.name: TensorFlow
items.desc: End-to-end ML platform. Used for model training, deployment, and TFLite edge inference.

items.name: Pandas
items.desc: Python data manipulation library. Core tool for data cleaning and transformation.

items.name: Google BigQuery
items.desc: Serverless data warehouse for large-scale analytics. Used in Google's certificate.

items.name: scikit-learn
items.desc: ML library for Python with clean APIs for classification, regression, and clustering.

items.name: FastAPI
items.desc: Modern, high-performance Python API framework with automatic OpenAPI docs.

items.name: Django
items.desc: High-level Python web framework. Covered in Meta Back-End Developer certificate.

items.name: Next.js
items.desc: React framework for production. Powers this portfolio.

items.name: Docker
items.desc: Container platform for consistent deployments across all backend projects.

items.name: Coursera
items.desc: Platform hosting both Meta Back-End and Google Advanced Data Analytics certificates.

items.name: Nand2Tetris
items.desc: Build a modern computer from first principles. Foundational for hardware-software interface.

items.name: MIT Missing Semester
items.desc: Essential CS tools: shell, vim, git, debugging. Bridges theory and practice.

items.name: 3Blue1Brown
items.desc: Visual, intuitive explanations of math and ML. Essential for real understanding.
